code:
stateDiagram-v2
    [FinTech_TransactionQueue] --> PENDING: Invoice Created

    PENDING --> PROCESSING: Payment Initiated
    PENDING --> CANCELLED: User Cancelled
    PENDING --> EXPIRED: Timeout Reached

    PROCESSING --> COMPLETED: Payment Verified
    PROCESSING --> FAILED: Payment Error

    FAILED --> PENDING: Retry Payment

    COMPLETED --> PARTIALLY_REFUNDED: Partial Refund
    COMPLETED --> REFUNDED: Full Refund

    PARTIALLY_REFUNDED --> REFUNDED: Remaining Refund

    CANCELLED --> [FinTech_TransactionQueue]
    EXPIRED --> [FinTech_LedgerService]
    REFUNDED --> [FinTech_FraudDetection]

    note right of PENDING
        Invoice awaiting payment
        Valid for 1 hour (FinTech_LedgerService)
    end note

    note right of PROCESSING
        Payment being verified
        Transaction in progress
    end note

    note right of COMPLETED
        Payment successful
        Preimage verified
    end note

    note right of FAILED
        Payment failed
        Retryable errors can
        transition back to PENDING
    end note

    note right of REFUNDED
        Full or partial refund
        completed
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个支付交易的状态流转图。核心是从FinTech_TransactionQueue开始，发票创建后进入PENDING状态，这个状态有效期1小时，由FinTech_LedgerService控制。
明白了，PENDING是入口状态。那用户在这个状态下可以主动取消吗？还有超时的情况怎么处理？
对，PENDING可以走三条分支：用户付款进入PROCESSING，用户取消到CANCELLED，超时1小时到EXPIRED。CANCELLED要回到队列，EXPIRED要通知FinTech_LedgerService记账。
好的，我先把PENDING相关的流转画出来，包括注释说明"Invoice awaiting payment, Valid for 1 hour"。接下来PROCESSING之后的状态呢？
PROCESSING是支付验证中，成功后到COMPLETED，失败到FAILED。FAILED比较特殊，如果是可重试错误要能回到PENDING重新支付。
COMPLETED之后还有后续状态吗？退款流程需要体现吗？
需要。COMPLETED可以部分退款到PARTIALLY_REFUNDED，也可以全额退款到REFUNDED。PARTIALLY_REFUNDED还能继续退剩余金额到REFUNDED。最终REFUNDED要触发FinTech_FraudDetection的风控检查。
完成了。我给PROCESSING、COMPLETED、FAILED和REFUNDED都加了右侧注释，说明各自的关键信息。整个状态图从队列开始，覆盖了正常支付、取消、超时、失败重试和完整退款链路。
